mapper.select: SELECT NVL(SUM(BD.BGT_AMT) - SUM(BD.BGT_EXCN), 0) AS remainBudget FROM BUDGET_MASTER M JOIN BUDGET_DETAIL BD ON M.BGT_M_CD = BD.BGT_M_CD WHERE M.BGT_YR = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE EMP_STTS = 'Y' AND EMP_ROLE != '관리자'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PROJECT WHERE PROJ_STTS = '진행'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMPLAINT WHERE DCL_DT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM')
